features.name: Auth Store & Forms
features.description: Client auth persisted in localStorage with token/user. Login form posts to /auth/login and stores auth in zustand.

features.name: Cart Store & MiniCart
features.description: Cart with size/color on line items, persisted in localStorage. MiniCart drawer UI with mobile-friendly navigation to /cart.

features.name: Quick View Add-to-Cart
features.description: Quick View modals in home sections allow choosing size/color and add to cart with options.

features.name: Product Fetch & Mapping
features.description: API helpers and product mapping from backend API shape to storefront Product type.

features.name: Coupons
features.description: Validate coupons and apply discount client-side based on backend response.

features.name: Payments (Razorpay)
features.description: Create Razorpay order, open checkout, verify signature, and place order.

features.name: Collections Page
features.description: Client filtering (category, color, size, price, search) with Quick View and load-more.

features.name: UI & Layout
features.description: Header with auth/logout, wishlist, cart badge; shared UI components.
